message:
test: add dry-run output test, fix search assertion, and rustfmt cleanup

- New test_create_dry_run_plain_output_is_line_oriented: verifies that
  dry-run create produces standalone lines for title, type, and priority
  (regression test for the print_line fix).
- search_text_output: tighten assertion to check for specific result
  titles and minimum line count instead of a loose substring match.
- Formatting cleanup across e2e_concurrency, e2e_global_flags, and
  e2e_search_scenarios to comply with rustfmt line-length limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
